title: Pi tickflow MVP extension
description: Build a Pi-native Ticks wave executor MVP as a project-local extension. The MVP should execute tick dependency waves with Pi subagents, supervise attempts using durable tick state and verifier evidence, and avoid accepting premature agent completion.
closed_reason: Tickflow MVP implemented: project-local Pi extension with contract compilation, subagent runtime, evidence/verifier collection, supervisor loop, wave scheduler, lease metadata, docs, and passing go test ./....
